title: Standard voice chat
description: a vanilla modpack für server whit voice chat with useful mods.
body:
Hi


This is a modpack for vanilla minecraft with voice chat mod. The voice chat mod makes it possible to talk to each other without having to chat. And in this mod pack there are more mods that are very useful.


This modpack has various mods in it among others:

[Simpel Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - For talking on a server with others.

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - To get more performance out of Minecraft

[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - To make the F3 menu look better.

[Emoji Typer](https://modrinth.com/mod/emoji-type) - For emoji in chat signs etc.

[Emojiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojiful) - For More emoji.

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - For shaders in Minecraft

[JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - for your big map and a small map with points to mark.

[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - for zooming
There is much more...


i wish you a lot of fun with the modpack


_**But beware maybe some mods are not allowed on server check that.**_
